creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wen
Date: Tue Aug 28 12:37:09 2012
New Revision: 303283
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/303283

Log:
  trytond_account is a account module for tryton.
  
  The account module defines fundamentals for most of accounting needs.
  It include: General accounting, Fiscal year management, Taxes management,
  Journal entries, Reconciliation. And with reports: General ledger,  Trial
  balance, Balance sheet, Income statement, Third party balance, Aged
  balance and General journal.
  
  WWW: http://www.tryton.org/
  
  PR:		170553
  Submitted by:	Matthias Petermann <matthias@d2ux.net>

Added:
  head/finance/trytond_account/
  head/finance/trytond_account/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_account/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_account/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_account/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/finance/Makefile

Modified: head/finance/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/finance/Makefile	Tue Aug 28 12:21:40 2012	(r303282)
+++ head/finance/Makefile	Tue Aug 28 12:37:09 2012	(r303283)
@@ -104,6 +104,7 @@
     SUBDIR += tinyerp-server
     SUBDIR += tryton
     SUBDIR += trytond
+    SUBDIR += trytond_account
     SUBDIR += trytond_company
     SUBDIR += trytond_country
     SUBDIR += trytond_currency

Added: head/finance/trytond_account/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_account/Makefile	Tue Aug 28 12:37:09 2012	(r303283)
@@ -0,0 +1,25 @@
+# New ports collection makefile for:	trytond_account
+# Date created:		12 August, 2012
+# Whom:			Matthias Petermann<matthias@petermann.it>
+#
+# $FreeBSD$
+#
+
+PORTNAME=	trytond_account
+PORTVERSION=	2.4.1
+CATEGORIES=	finance python
+MASTER_SITES=	http://downloads2.tryton.org/${PORTVERSION:R}/
+
+MAINTAINER=	matthias@petermann.it
+COMMENT=	The Account Module for Tryton
+
+LICENSE=	GPLv3
+
+RUN_DEPENDS=	trytond>=2.4.0:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond \
+		trytond_company>=2.4.0:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond_company \
+		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}dateutil>=1.5:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-dateutil
+
+USE_PYTHON=	yes
+USE_PYDISTUTILS=easy_install
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/finance/trytond_account/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_account/distinfo	Tue Aug 28 12:37:09 2012	(r303283)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (trytond_account-2.4.1.tar.gz) = 1e12c9176fc8007a1304db90c464e4866693ca3da9d01146ecda4e54a242e67e
+SIZE (trytond_account-2.4.1.tar.gz) = 240508

Added: head/finance/trytond_account/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_account/pkg-descr	Tue Aug 28 12:37:09 2012	(r303283)
@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+trytond_account is a account module for tryton.
+
+The account module defines fundamentals for most of accounting needs.
+It include: General accounting, Fiscal year management, Taxes management,
+Journal entries, Reconciliation. And with reports: General ledger,  Trial
+balance, Balance sheet, Income statement, Third party balance, Aged
+balance and General journal.
+
+WWW: http://www.tryton.org/
